name: python3-sigmavirus24-urltemplate
title: python3-sigmavirus24-urltemplate
summary: Simple Python library to deal with URI Templates - Python 3.x
description:
Simple Python library to deal with URI Templates - Python 3.x
It provides several API for URI template parsing
which implements RFC6570.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sigmavirus24-urltemplate because Simple Python library to deal with URI Templates - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sigmavirus24-urltemplate as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sigmavirus24-urltemplate with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sigmavirus24-urltemplate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
